name: Mokettes Aux Amandes (Almond Mochettes)
recipeInstructions:
1. Shell the almonds and lightly grill them.
2. Grind the almonds with rum in a mortar until finely pulverized.
3. Grate the chocolate into fine powder.
4. Mix grated chocolate with milk to form a paste.
5. Add coffee concentrate, confectioners' sugar, and ground almonds to the paste.
6. Mix all ingredients well until combined.
7. Form the mixture into balls.
8. Roll the balls in grated or granulated chocolate.
9. Allow the mochettes to stand for 5-6 hours before serving to ensure they harden.
